This one is like very vague.
We usually go in much more detail.
For example, if it has to be a listicle, then we say, okay, listicle with like eight steps that include, and then we provide the steps.
So we try to give it as much direction as possible in the beginning to avoid like bad outlines, which from a writing standpoint, outlines are really the skeleton of an article.
And if you don't get the outline right, then nothing else works.
So we give it an assignment direction, and then it generates an assignment brief.
And the assignment brief generates kind of this step, takes into account the company context and the audience personas, and it also uses SEMrush's API.

To analyze this keyword, AI travel agents, and then it returns an analysis of the target audience, the SEO metadata, it analyzes the target keyword, so it gives us the monthly search volume, what is the competition level, like what are the top three competitors, and then it also gives us a list of other keyword opportunities that we should incorporate into the article, which is good, just to kind of make sure the article is really comprehensive, and like hitting all of those like SEO keywords, and then when we scroll down, we get to the proposed content structure, and we edit this heavily, so we will usually maybe change the structure, add additional H2s, H3s, for example, like already here, it's like suggesting picking a tool like MindTrip, or I mean AI, which we don't want it to mention.
So this is something that we would address actually in the assignment direction.

So this is, so we would, like, edit all of this.
Obviously, we would, like, remove references to all of your competitors and just make sure that, like, it's covering, like, all of the necessary information that it needs for the article.
And then when we're happy with the, with this initial outline, we just save and continue.
And then it runs a research step.
The research step basically uses perplexity to dig up as much information as possible about this topic using the brief.

So we have kind of a small knowledge base on this topic so that the article can actually be in depth.

And as a step, and one thing to note about AI visibility in general, so I write a lot of SEO and AEO related blog posts for SEMrush, and one thing that's been kind of, you know, every month there's kind of a new best practice, and then it turns out, no, actually might not be a best practice.

For example, one thing that was mentioned for a good couple of months was adding schema markup, that it's a great LLM optimization step, that they use it to analyze, like, websites, and I think it was Search Engine Journal, they ran a test, and LLMs, turns out, they don't read schema markup, they don't recognize the code, and everybody was just, like, parroting this advice, but nobody had actually tested it, and it turned out that actually, no, they're just using the words on a page that they can kind of access, and that's it, so they don't really access, like, the schema.
So that was really interesting, and it requires updating a lot of blog posts that people have written about SEO and AEO.
But one thing that we've seen with all of our clients and all of the clients that I've worked with here since December is that just following standard SEO best practices works for AI visibility.
And if you have a good content strategy, if you're covering the right topics, if you're kind of filling the right content gaps, you start showing up in LLMs.

So that's why we need access to Google Search Console and GA4 to collect all of that data.
And then we have a seven or eight-page report in Looker that breaks down your organic and referral traffic by landing page.
One of the pages in the report also breaks down just our content's performance, and it's categorized by clusters.
So that's why we also have those clusters.
We want to be able to see which one of them is performing the best in organic search.
And then the last page in that report also includes an LLI.
Referral analysis, so we can see how many users came to your site through AI.
So it's a good way to kind of analyze your AI visibility through that medium as well.
Yeah, I don't think, is there anything else that you wanted to discuss today?
I think this is everything I wanted to cover.
No, it's great progress.
Yeah, it's great.
All right, perfect.
Erik, is there anything else that we're waiting on?
No?
I don't believe so.
Okay.
I will double check, but I do not believe so.
Okay.
It would just be any feedback, now that you've seen the content strategy, any feedback on that would be kind of number one priority.
We'll both try to take a look at that today.
Okay.
Okay.
Okay.
Okay.
You
It's good.
Wonderful.
Amazing.
Well, thank you so much for your time.
I'm available over Slack if you need anything.
But, yeah, I hope you have a great weekend, and we'll see you next week.
Thank you so much.
Thanks.
Thank you.
See you.
Bye.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Otto and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, AI visibility, and blog setup for Otto's website.](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy focuses on 3 main clusters: AI travel assistant/business travel automation, business travel disruption/optimization, and business travel solutions](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Otto's AI visibility is surprisingly good at 3.5% considering its newness, with room for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=2167.0)
  - [Blog setup and featured image creation process discussed; Jason to work on blog structure within a week](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
  - [Scrunch dashboard set up to track AI visibility across 175 prompts, with potential to add more](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=2107.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [Primary goals: Traditional SEO, AI search visibility, educating audience](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [Context: New domain, no existing content - opportunity for broad, deep strategy](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Target audience: Business travelers using leisure sites, smaller businesses](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [3 main topic clusters identified:](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
    1.  AI travel assistant and business travel automation
    2.  Business travel disruption and optimization
    3.  Business travel solutions (more commercial focus)
  - [Small business travel management as additional focus](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)

### Blog Setup and Structure

  - [Jason actively working on website changes, including blog page and single post template](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
  - [CMS already set up in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
  - [Key elements to include:](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
      - [Author attribution (preferably real person, not just "Otto team")](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
      - [Breadcrumbs (e.g., home/blog/post-title)](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
      - [Categories reflecting content strategy clusters](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [Two-step approach: Immediate structural/content changes, followed by potential redesign in 1-2 months](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)

### Featured Images for Blog Posts

  - [GrowthX to provide AI-generated featured images](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Need visual branding guidelines (fonts, colors) from Otto](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)
  - [Considering abstract illustrations with text overlay](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)
  - [Single image size provided, but potential to discuss multiple formats (e.g., Open Graph)](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=2026.0)

### AI Visibility and Tracking

  - [Scrunch dashboard set up to monitor Otto's AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=2084.0)
  - [175 prompts tracked across various LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=2107.0)
  - [Otto's current visibility at 3.5%, which is good for a new company](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=2167.0)
  - [Breakdown of visibility by position, sentiment, and citations](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=2222.0)
  - [Google Looker Studio used for organic traffic performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [Current top competitors identified in Scrunch](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=2153.0)
  - [Jason requested adding "Engine" as a competitor to track](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=2185.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to review content strategy document and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=2459.0)
  - [Jason to work on blog structure and templates within the next week](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
  - [Otto to provide visual branding guidelines for featured images](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)
  - [GrowthX to add "Engine" as a competitor in Scrunch dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=2207.0)
  - [Otto to grant access to Google Search Console and GA4 for traffic analysis](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)
  - [Next weekly sync to review progress and any additional feedback](https://fathom.video/share/m_dT9wx6GBz6Reka1TRoqye6_okPoaWL?tab=summary&timestamp=2421.0)

action_items.description: Review content strategy doc in Notion. Leave feedback/comments on pain points, additional topics
Provide visual branding guidelines (fonts, colors) for blog featured images. Share Figma file or Google Drive folder
Add Engine to competitors list in Notion doc
Review content strategy today with Michael. Provide joint feedback
